response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 5+ years of hands-on C++ development experience on Windows platforms, which is mandatory for this role. While they have C/C++ exposure in embedded systems (NI LabWindows) and real-time applications (Dlang), their primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with no recent or substantial C++ work in capital markets or fixed-income systems. Domain experience in financial services is also absent.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization (DLang, Asynchronous I/O)
Open-source contributions and extensive full-stack development experience
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows (critical for the role)
No domain expertise in fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets
Lacks direct experience with SQL Server/Oracle and messaging frameworks (Kafka, MQ)

key_factors.factor: Fixed Income / Capital Markets domain expertise
